name: max-ui
description: Max-UI provides project-aware frontend design, refactoring, and visual quality assurance for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Max-UI reads an existing frontend before changing it, extracts its design language, detects generic AI patterns and visual defects, applies scoped improvements, and verifies responsive behavior and accessibility.
defaultPrompt: Audit this frontend and identify the highest-impact visual problems.
Polish this interface while preserving its product identity.
Redesign this page with a distinctive, domain-specific visual direction.
